Fight?

XXX
Viscount Ravi
Lukesh
Sendis
Tovez
Slay the demons
Viscount Ravi has instructed you to slay demons
XXX

Congratzzzzzzzzz!

You fail at failing!

To Be Continued...

You have completed the latest chapter of Dragon Age Legends. We will update the game with new content each week, so check back soon for the next chapter of your adventure.
Stay up to date with the latest news about Legends by Liking the game and following us at www.twitter.com/da_legends
The Journey Has Ended

Congratulations! By defeating the Pride Demon, you have rescued Thedas from a terrible blight. You can continue to beat back evil forces in raids or on respawning nodes scattered across the maps. Thank you for your legendary contribution, and be sure to follow BioWare Social on Twitter, Facebook, or Google+ for the latest news on upcoming projects!
Prove Yourself
Mastering Combat
Before you begin your legendary adventure, I am going to show you the basics of combat. After a few battles, you will be well prepared for the road ahead.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
Good work. You are well on your way to becoming a legendary hero. Your adventure is about to begin.
Set out on the Planasene pass to reach Lukesh and Eiton
Build your castle
The Journey Begins

{%HeroName%}, your adventure is ready to begin. I need you to locate the mage Lukesh and my son Eiton in the Planasene Forest. To reach the forest, take the Planasene Pass through the Vimmark Mountains.
Set out on the Planasene pass to reach Lukesh and Eiton
Fire Bombs
Throw a Fire Bomb at an enemy to drain both {HEART, 2} and {MANA, 3}.
Draining {MANA} from enemies will prevent them from using skills.
Learn about Fire Bombs and use one in battle
Quest Complete
{%HeroName%}, you are encountering an unusual amount of darkspawn. This does not bode well.
Set out on the Planasene pass to reach Lukesh and Eiton
The Journey Begins
Once again you have proven your worth, {%HeroName%}. Now that your estate is secure, let's take a tour of the grounds surrounding it.
Set out on Planasene Pass to reach Lukesh and Eiton
Decide whether or not to invite Korznik into your party
Choose between Korznik and Antor
The Mercenary
Make a decision on whether or not to include Korznik in your party
The Son
Meet Antor
Take sides
Side with one of the two men and defeat the other in combat
Bring Korznik along with you
Choose Korznik?
Choosing this will add Korznik to your party. Do you want to continue?
Attack Korznik
Fight Korznik?
Choosing this will not add Korznik to your party. Do you want to continue?
Choose Antor over Korznik
Align with Antor
This option will keep Antor in your party over Korznik. Do you want to continue?
Team up with Korznik
Choose Korznik
This option will add Korznik in your party and remove Antor. Do you want to continue?
Janara? Bavain? What are you doing here?
I bear a message from Lukesh, my lord.
Viscount Ravi, there has been an unusal amount of darkspawn activity lately. Your son is safe, but I recommend an investigation into the matter.
It must be serious for Lukesh to have sent this message. You must aid me, {%HeroName%}.
Bavain and I will join you as well. If the darkspawn are getting stronger, you'll need help.
What is this? A parade of beards?
Our mission is urgent. Get out of our way.
I see. Mind if I join your little caravan?
{%HeroName%}, I do not trust this rogue. What say we scare him off with a little show of force?
Choose the crossed swords icon to fight off Korznik, or the storybook icon to accept his offer to join you.
Not a terrible idea, {%HeroName%}, perhaps he can be of some use in our journey. REMOVED FOR BREVITY
Glad I could tag along. The name is Korznik. Hello, who is this?
Janara. If you enjoy having fingers, keep them away from me and my blade.
Fiesty!
No need to get uppity. I can see where I am not wanted.
That was invigorating.
Korznik! You killed my father; prepare to die!
It's possible. Who are you?
I am Antor Banris, son of Regald Banris, a good and honorable man of Vol Dorma.
No, didn't kill him.
Lies! You die now!
You have not seen the last of me, vile brigands!
That's a pity.
Pardon, my name is Antor. I am looking for a criminal by the name of Korznik.
We are on a rather urgent mission of great import. We have no time for this.
You think he means that mercenary we met?
I think I will accompany you for a while, then. It is dangerous to go alone.
Ah! There he is! You must help me capture the assassin!
You guys again? Why did you have to bring HIM?
I'm not sticking around for this.
He got away again!
You are siding with an assassin! I will make you regret your decision!
Thanks, kid. Here, use these the next time beanpole shows his dirty snout.
Maybe if we hit the assassin with these next time, he won't escape.
Fire Bombs
Throw a Fire Bomb at an enemy to drain both {HEART, 2} and {MANA, 3}.
Draining {MANA} from enemies will prevent them from using skills.
Quest Complete
{%HeroName%}, Lukesh and my son are in Planasene Forest, on the other side of the Vimmark Mountains. We will have to go over Freylen's Peak to get to the other side of the pass.
Set out on the Planasene Pass to reach Lukesh and Eiton
We Meet Once Again
Acquire another party member.
Acquire another party member.
Vantage Point

I want you to travel to Freylen's Peak. From that vantage point you will be able to see if there is a way to avoid this darkspawn scourge. It pains me to say, but stopping these twisted creatures is not as critical as finding Lukesh and my son.
Reach Freylen’s Peak to look for a way around the darkspawn
Sneak a Peak
Make it to the top of Freylen's Peak
Injury Kit
If an ally is low on health, the active hero can use an injury kit to heal their wounds.
If an ally is low on health, the active hero can use an injury kit to heal their wounds.
Quest Complete
From this overlook it is clear that Fort Elim is being overrun with darkspawn. We cannot stand by idly while good people are hurt, even if it means delaying the search for Eiton.
Reach Freylen’s Peak to look for a way around the darkspawn
Vantage Point
We need to travel to Freylen's Peak. From that vantage point we should be able to see the forest where Lukesh and my son are.
Reach Freylen’s Peak to look for a way around the darkspawn
Sneak a Peak
Make it to the top of Freylen's Peak
Help Joslin find her allies
Help Joslin?
Helping Joslin will add her to your party. Do you want to continue?
Leave Joslin and continue onward
Leave Joslin?
Moving forward will not add Joslin to your party. Do you want to continue?
So what is this terribly urgent quest you are on?
So it's nice of you to have me along, but where are we going?
To find Lukesh and my son Eiton in the Planasene Forest.
You remember Lukesh, {%HeroName%}? He also fought against that demon long ago.
Now he takes care of my son Eiton in a safe location. At least it WAS safe.
With all these darkspawn about... we must hurry.
That horde of darkspawn up ahead is attacking someone... she's fending them off with a dagger? That's my kind of woman.
There is a horde of darkspawn up ahead attacking someone. We need to help her.
So many dead... if only we had gotten here sooner. What is your name, girl?
I am Joslin, but there is no time. More of my friends are up this path, we must help them.
Of course. Our mission is not so urgent that we cannot help those in need.
We really do need to be moving forward, we cannot delay.
You can't spare a moment to save my friends? Please, I need your help.
We are on a rather urgent mission right now.
They're probably dead by now. We'll be dead too if we don't go now.
Fine. If you won't help, I will go myself.
All dead. They are all dead.
This is not a surprise to me.
They might have lived if you would have helped!
Join us, we promise you will have a chance to exact revenge on darkspawn.
Gladly. I will destroy every darkspawn I see.
I appreciate your help here. Quickly, they should be right up here...
We are too late for these few. But where is Faran? Xion? Nera? We must keep looking!
There they are... we must hurry!
We saved a few, Joslin. But the others—there was nothing we could do.
We are Ferelden refugees, looking for a new home. If you'll have us, we will travel with you until then. You'll have my blade.
We appreciate your aid.
We were traveling inland hoping to find a safe place to settle down.
So many friends died to the darkspawn in Ferelden, and now here.
Injury Kit
If an ally is low on health, the active hero can use an injury kit to heal their wounds.
If an ally is low on health, the active hero can use an injury kit to heal their wounds.
Quest Complete
From this overlook it is clear that Fort Elim is being overrun with darkspawn. We can aid them, though it would pain me to delay meeting up with Lukesh and my son Eiton.
Reach Freylen’s Peak to look for a way around the darkspawn
Darkspawn Detour
Fort Elim is located just downstream from here. Travel there and rout the darkspawn threat.
Travel to Fort Elim in order to rid it of darkspawn
Knock, Knock
Arrive at Fort Elim
A tough battle is always easier with trustworthy companions at your side.
Invite your friends to join your adventure in Dragon Age Legends!
Shock Bombs
Shock Bombs strike all enemies with an electric charge.
Use Shock Bombs when facing large groups of monsters.
Use Shock Bombs
Quest Complete
There, just over the ridge, is Fort Elim. Clearing it of darkspawn will help keep the people of Kaiten secure.
Travel to Fort Elim in order to rid it of darkspawn
Darkspawn Detour
Fort Elim is located just downstream from here, and on the way as well. We may be able to enlist more help there before meeting up with Lukesh and Eiton.
Travel to Fort Elim and enlist more aid
Knock, Knock
Arrive at Fort Elim
A tough battle is always easier with trustworthy companions at your side.
Invite your friends to join your adventure in Dragon Age Legends!
Shock Bombs
Shock Bombs strike all enemies with an electric charge.
Use Shock Bombs when facing large groups of monsters.
Use Shock Bombs
That must be Fort Elim up ahead. Keep your eyes peeled for that assassin.
Nobody said anything about an assassin...
He's just a bit paranoid. Now darkspawn, that we can worry about.
They call that a fort? Where are the guards?
If they can't be seen, you can't riddle them with arrows.
I'd never think of it.
Quest Complete
There, just over the ridge, is Fort Elim. Hopefully some allies can be found within.
Travel to Fort Elim in order to gain some allies.
Secure Fort Elim
The Fort is overrun with the tainted beasts. Dispatch of the darkspawn quickly, so that you can continue your quest to find my son.
Reduce the darkspawn population at Fort Elim to 0
The Exterminator
Eliminate all darkspawn at Fort Elim
Invest {COIN,1} you earn during your adventure to upgrade {%castle_name%}.
Use workshops in your castle to craft potions, bombs and kits.
Frost Bombs
Frost Bombs freeze enemies in their place, preventing them from acting.
Use Frost Bombs when you spot a powerful enemy coming up in the turn queue.
Use Frost Bombs
Quest Complete
Fort Elim is secure. I thank you greatly for this legendary feat. The people of Kaiten will sing tales of your heroism.
Reduce the darkspawn population at Fort Elim to 0
Secure Fort Elim
The Fort is overrun with the tainted beasts. Dispatch of the darkspawn quickly, so that you can continue your quest to find my son.
Reduce the darkspawn population at Fort Elim to 0
The Exterminator
Eliminate all darkspawn at Fort Elim
Fort Elim seems to be completely overrun! I was just here and everything was fine! Perhaps there are still survivors.
Death everywhere, the darkspawn have destroyed everything. It looks like they went this way. My blades hunger.
There's a mass of darkspawn up ahead assaulting that door.
Thank you. I am not sure how much longer we could have held them off.
I am Viscount Ravi, and this is {%HeroName%}, my trusted second. We are investigating this darkspawn scourge and are looking for able allies.
A noble goal to be sure. I am Cerlais. Help me reclaim this fort and I will join you.
It's another blight! Watch out behind you, there's more!
There's your problem right there. This place just reeks of taint.
Oh my. An ogre.
Derandt! Foolish old man...
I'll be... on my feet soon...
Do not worry, my lord. I will have him back to fighting shape in no time.
I have a cousin in Kirkwall, which is just on the other side of this forest. She is an able warrior and would readily join our cause.
Fortunately Kirkwall is on the way. We'll stop there to recruit and supply before our foray into the Planasene Forest.
Quest Complete

Fort Elim is secure, but Derandt was badly wounded. At least Cerlais has joined us. Her healing magic will be immensely helpful in bringing Derandt back to health, as well as keeping us alive against the darkspawn threat.
Reduce the darkspawn population at Fort Elim to 0
Safe Passage
Now that Fort Elim is cleared of darkspawn, continue following the Elim Stream straight into the Planasene Forest. Eliminate any darkspawn you encounter to help keep the Fort secure.
Follow the Elim Stream to the Vimmark Mountains
Mountaineer
Successfully traverse the Vimmark Mountains
Antidote Kits
Antidote Kits cure poisoned heroes and restore {HEART, 4}.
Use Antidote Kits quickly when facing poisonous enemies.
Use Antidote Kits
Quest Complete
You've made your way across the Vimmark Mountains. There's just a short way to go before you get to the Planasene Forest, and can find Lukesh and my son. Eiton means the world to me.
Follow the Elim Stream to the Vimmark Mountains
Safe Passage

Now that Fort Elim is cleared of darkspawn, continue following the Elim Stream straight into the Planasene Forest. The Vimmark Mountains are filled with things more dangerous than darkspawn, though, so we must be careful!
Make it across the Vimmark Mountains to Kirkwall.
Mountaineer
Successfully traverse the Vimmark Mountains
It's quiet. Too quiet.
Perhaps your concern about a blight is a bit premature?
I expected to see some more darkspawn out here.
I saw none on my way through here previously.
Spiders! Watch your backs!
Looks like we'll have to fight our way past this nest to get through.
Korznik? It is hard to run in a spidersilk cocoon, no?
You appear to have me at a disadvantage, sir. I swear I did not kill your father.
Ha! What proof can you offer you did not kill him?
None from this vantage. But I swear to help you find the real killer. If you cut me free, that is.
Fine.
Fine words from a professed killer. I'll sleep well knowing you are a spider's dinner. Farewell.
Try and sleep well knowing that the next time I see you, I will kill you.
Antor? Spidersilk looks good on you. Cocoons are so last year, though.
Are you here to kill me like you did my father?
Say I cut you free. We could use a good archer. Truce?
Do I have any other choice?
Not really, no.
I'm not going to kill you. But I'm not letting you out so you can try to kill me.
Come back here, I'll bite your kneecaps off!
Feeling better, Derandt?
Cerlais is a miracle worker. I don't know what was in that tincture, but I think it even cured my arthritis.
Antidote Kits
Antidote Kits cure poisoned heroes and restore {HEART, 4}.
Use Antidote Kits quickly when facing poisonous enemies.
Use Antidote Kits
Quest Complete
We've made it to Kirkwall. Just a quick stop to supply and recruit before going to the Planasene Forest, where we can find Lukesh and my son. Eiton means the world to me.
Follow the Elim Stream to the Vimmark Mountains
The Rascal Raspin

While Fort Elim was overrun, a gang of bandits led by the thief Raspin took advantage of the chaos and have been causing havoc in the Planasene Foothills. You may encounter some resistance on this last leg of your journey to the Forest
Defeat Raspin and his bandits to ensure Planasene Pass is safe for travelers
Safe Travels
Kill Raspin and secure Planasene Pass
Purchase unique, powerful gear in the premium store.
Use gold to purchase loot, distinguish your hero and hasten your progress.
Concentration Potion
Increasing your Concentration doubles your chances of scoring a Crit.
When you land a Crit, your hero deals twice as much damage as normal.
Concentration Potion
Quest Complete
Thank you for eliminating the threat posed by Raspin. With his gang leaderless, the Planasene Pass is once again a safe route for all travelers.
Attend to the Viscount's request
Locate Lukesh
With Planasene Pass cleared, travel into the heart of Planasene Forest to find my old friend, the mage Lukesh, and my son Eiton.
Make your way into Plansene Forest
Cleaning Up
Eliminate the surviving members of Raspin's gang
Into the Woods
Reach the edge of the forest
Locate Lukesh
With the Planasene Pass cleared, travel into the heart of the Planasene Forest to find my old friend Lukesh and my son Eiton.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Raspin's Remnants
Although you defeated Raspin, remnants of his gang are still impeding your progress. Clear out any of the thugs that get in your way.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
You've made it to the forest edge, but Lukesh's home is well protected, and for good reason. To reach it you will need to recover a key that is hidden deep within the forest.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Tanner's Gang

Raspin's lieutenant, Tanner, must have splintered off and made the Planasene Forest his home. You'll have to get through him to reach the the key that will guide you to Lukesh. You can choose to face the gang head on or try and sneak up on them by taking the longer northern path around their encampment.
Decide how to dispatch of Tanner and his gang of thieves
Two Methods...
Choose whether to approach Tanner's gang directly or flank them
...One Result
Defeat Tanner and his men
Quest Complete
With Tanner out of the way, I need you to head further into the forest. Maker speed you on your journey. As each day passes, my concern for Lukesh and Eiton grows and grows.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Hidden Key
Follow this broken path until you find a decaying caravan. Hidden inside is the amulet which will grant you access past the barriers put up by Lukesh.
Find the hidden amulet needed to reach Lukesh's house
Scavenger Hunt
Find out what happened to the amulet
It's a Trap!
Survive the ambush
Ambush
The amulet...it's missing. Look out!
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
Between the missing amulet and the ambush by these demonic forces, my fears appear justified. Without the amulet, you will need to take the long way around.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
The Long Way
There is another path to the home where Lukesh guards my son. It is longer and far more treacherous, but it is the only way to find out if they are safe.
Find an alternate route to Lukesh's house
Are We There Yet?
Start on the long road to reach Lukesh and Eiton
Quest Complete
The first leg of your route to Lukesh's house is complete. Unfortunately, that was the easy part.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Upriver

The entrance to the safe house where Lukesh guards Eiton is found in a dense and tangled bog. Follow this constrained path upriver until it opens up. Judging from the journey so far, I expect that the resistance you face will only get more ferocious.
Follow the river until you find the bog that contains Lukesh's safe house
Bogged Down
Reach the bog
Quest Complete
You have reached the bog. Unfortunately, it is such a tangled web that I cannot easily guide you to the tunnel that will take you to Lukesh's safe house.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Halfway Home
Search the bog. When you find the tunnel that leads to dwarven ruins, you'll have found the correct route.
Search the area for the tunnel that leads to dwarven ruins...and Lukesh's safe house
The Light at the End
Discover which path leads to the dwarven tunnel
Advance Warning
Defend yourself against the ambush
False Trail
This is not the right tunnel. You must continue your search.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Look Out
Whoever is behind this must have known we were coming. Defend yourself!
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
That was incredible. Your prowess as a warrior has grown tremendously. I wish I could say that you have seen the last of these demons, but I sense this is only the start...
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Aeduecan's Gift
From here you need to find a dwarven statue. This long forgotten gift from the Aeduecan family is a marker that will lead you to Eiton.
Find the next marker on the path to Lukesh's safe house
The Gift
Locate Aeduecan's gift, a dwarven statue, inside the ruins
Quest Complete
You are very close, the statue is in plain sight. However, a nest of darkspawn is blocking your progress.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Helping Hand
Help these lost darkspawn by sending them back to the Maker, where they belong. They are the only thing standing between you and the safe house I pray holds my son.
Defeat the darkspawn in order to reach Lukesh's safe house
Buh-bye
Use your fighting prowess to send the darkspawn back to the Maker
Quest Complete
Well done. Quickly now, head to the safe house and find Lukesh and Eiton.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Find Eiton
Just beyond the statue is Glendel's Hollow, where Lukesh protects my son. Reach their home and confirm that they are alive.
Find the safe house and meet up with Lukesh and Eiton
Nice to Meet You
Rescue Ravi's son Eiton from the darkspawn horde
Save Eiton
There's the safe house, and it's under assault. Maker help you dispatch of these demons and save my son.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
Maker be praised, both Lukesh and Eiton are alive! But this fight is not over yet.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Secure the Safe House
We must protect ourselves against another attack. These demons have been at it for days, and all of my defenses have been broken. Help rebuild the defenses to guard against another attack.
Help Lukesh repel the darkspawn forces
Protect This House
Defeat the darkspawn invasion and secure the safe house
Quest Complete
Our home is secure...for the moment. Now I think it is time for us to strike back at our aggressors.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Offensive

The demons are under the control of a witch named Soliel. She has a small encampment of minions near here. I think it is time for us to go on the offensive. Take out her encampment, then return to me.
Attack the nearby encampment of Soliel's minions
No Camping Allowed
Destroy Soliel's encampment
Coming Home
Return to the safe house
Small Victory
Well done, {%HeroName%}, taking out this camp was a small victory against Soliel. Now return to the safe house.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
You've done well, but it appears the encampment was a decoy. Steel yourself for battle.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Protect the Hollow
While you were taking care of the decoy, Soliel has massed a giant assault. The northern edge the hollow is under attack. Defend us from the demons.
Protect the safe house from Soliel's assault
From the North
Defend the northern edge of the hollow
From the South
Defend the southern edge of the hollow
Last Stand
Resist the final wave of enemy attacks
Another Wave
Another wave of demons approaches. Protect the southern edge of the hollow.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
The Final Push
It's not over yet. Protect us from this final wave of Soliel's assault.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
I thank the Maker that Ravi sent you to us. Eiton and I could not have survived without you.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Find Soliel

Soliel's demons have been stopped, but this will not be over until we have dealt with the witch herself. I want you to find her in Glendel's Ruins and subdue her so that we can bring her back to Kaiten.
Head to Glendel's Ruins to take the fight to Soleil herself
On the Offensive
Journey to the edge of Glendel's Ruins
Quest Complete

The demons' increasing ferociousness can only mean that Soliel is near. Although it would be safer to eliminate her, I think capture is a better option. Witches and demons don't normally mix, not like this at least...
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Approach the Ruins
Push onwards to Glendel's Ruins, where you will find Soliel.
Make your way into Glendel's Ruins to find Soleil
Witch way?
Reach Glendel's Ruins
Quest Complete
You have reached Glendel's Ruins. Maker be with you, for Soliel will surely put your heroism to the test.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Ambushed!
These demons must have been lying in wait for you. You must dispatch them to progress to Glendel's Ruins.
Defend against the surprise attack on your party
Rejected!
Survive the ambush
Quest Complete
Soliel's minions were no match for you. Push onwards till you face their leader.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Witch Hunt
{%HeroName%}, this leg of your adventure is almost at its end. Venture into the ruins, find Soliel, and subdue her.
Venture into the ruins, find Soliel, and subdue her
Blinded with Science
Find the alchemy lab
Pick a Path
Choose whether to search Farelen's estate or take the shorter route
This Is It
Capture Soliel alive
Farelen's Foil
The hero Farelen called Glendel his home. If you can find its ruins, you may be able to retrieve one of his treasures.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Abandoned Lab

Interesting. This pillar describes a great alchemy lab that once was the economic center of this lost city. Although it has been destroyed for years, I wonder if it may still contain anything that would aid you in your fight against Soliel.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Two Paths

There are two paths that lead to the witch Soliel. The route to the right past the abandoned lab is shorter than the more treacherous path to the left through the ruins of Farelen's estate. I think you should commit to one path, lest we allow Soliel to slip away.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Witch Hunt
This route through the ruins of Farelen's estate will lead you to your target. Find Soliel and subdue her.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Farelen's Foil
Choosing the route through Farelen's estate was a good choice. Farelen's Foil is a powerful ring and will be a great aid in your fight against Soliel.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Witch Hunt
This route past the abandoned alchemy lab will lead you to your target. Find Soliel and subdue her.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Abandoned Lab
Choosing the route past the lab was a good choice. These smelling salts will be a great aid in your fight against Soliel.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Subdue Soliel
{%HeroName%}, your greatest challenge yet lies ahead. Capture Soliel so that we can bring her back to Kaiten.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
The name {%HeroName%} will surely be written into the Book of Legends. Saving us from Soliel was an epic feat. Now, let's reunite Ravi with his son.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Like A Brother

Maker bless you for returning Eiton to me. Now that you've subdued Soliel, Lukesh and I will hold her and find out what, if anything, was behind this vicious assault. While we do, I need you to travel to the Green Dales. I have received an urgent help request from the Dalish Ranger Sendis.
Travel to the Green Dales to assist the Dalish Ranger Sendis
An Old Ally
Reach the camp where Sendis is staying
Like a Brother
Do you remember Sendis? He fought alongside me, Lukesh, Tovez, and his sister Iselle long ago. Sendis is like a brother to me...and he wouldn't have asked for assistance if it was not dire.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Darkspawn...
I wonder if these darkspawn are behind Sendis' request for aid? I hope that his camp has not been overrun by their dark taint.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
You have reached the camp of the Dalish Keeper Tianne, to which Sendis belongs.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Find Sendis
Search the camp and see if you can locate Sendis. It has been a long time since I've visited, but I believe that you will find his hut near a white, marble marker.
Locate Sendis' hut near the white marker
Friend or Foe?
Break through the Dalish resistance
Anyone Home?

Elven Resistance
This is not good. The Dalish aren't exactly known for being a friend to human strangers, but this show of force is well beyond even the worst I could have expected.

Unholy Alliance
This is really not good. Dalish and demons fighting side by side? Something horrible must have happened.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
Sendis has clearly abandoned his hut. I pray that the Maker and his skills as a Ranger have kept him alive.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Camouflage
Sendis is a fearsome fighter and would not die easy. If he was able to get a message to me, then chances are good that he is still alive. Search Belwain's Dale and see if you can find a trace of him.
Search Belwain's Dale for Sendis
A Discovery
Locate Sendis
Quest Complete
{%HeroName%}, somehow I'm not surprised that Ravi sent you instead of coming back himself. A viscount has duties he must attend to, as I am painfully aware...
Search Belwain's Dale for Sendis
The Dominated

Good thing I was able to find you in the Dales before the demons got to you. Tianne is using some sort of blood magic to dominate our entire clan. We'll need to cut through them if we wish to reach her.
Cut through the possessed elves in order to reach Tianne
Killing Them Softly
Use compassion when fighting the possessed elves
Oh Wellin
Help Sendis settle his debt to Wellin
A Gentle Touch
I know you have no choice, what with my clan being dominated by blood magic and all. Still, do you think you could be a bit more...gentle with them? I do know these elves, after all.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
Poor Wellin. I owed him a Viscount's ransom in crowns. At least that problem's been taken care of.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Path to Khenderlan
Ravi's Uncle, Khedra -- you remember him, right? -- had an estate near here named Khenderlan that Tianne has taken as her home. Travel there so that we can liberate my clan from her influence.
Head toward Khenderlan to confront Tianne and liberate the elves
A Furry Problem
Survive an encounter with werewolves
A Furry Problem
Werewolves! I bloody hate werewolves. Tianne must be dominating our lovable, local population of demon-possessed wolves now. Fantastic...
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
The Boy in the Woods
Hm, good work saving Ravi's son. No wonder he sent you after me. Just curious, did Ravi ever explain to you why Lukesh lives deep in the forest with Eiton?
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
You're making good progress toward Khenderlan. I hope all that werewolf fur you're shearing isn't making your eyes itch. I've heard demonic wolves can have that effect on humans.

River Crossing
There's a bridge crossing nearby that will take you across the spring that keeps this hollow so lush and green. Head there and take out any werewolves that cross your path.
Find the bridge that spans the river and leads to Khenderlan
The Bridge Is Out!
Reach the river crossing
Khenderlan

Khenderlan is where I first met Ravi, you know. He used to visit as a boy, back in the days before his uncle become an abomination and all. Khenderlan is where Ravi and my sister first got, erm, acquainted.
XXX
Quest Complete
It's bad enough that Tianne is sending skeletons, werewolves and my kin against us! Why'd she have to go and destroy the bridge, too?
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Keep Your Pants Dry
I was hoping to avoid the other route to Khenderlan. We'll have to travel through the east side of the hollow and ford the spring at its shallowest point. Just try and keep your pants dry...
Find a safe spot to ford the river and reach Khenderlan
Wet Work
Safely cross the river
Persistence Pays Off
When Ravi first met my sister, you could tell right away he was smitten. Iselle toyed with him mercilessly, but he was quite persistent...for a human.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
Not bad. Ravi and I once had a bit of a confrontation in this very river. You're not nearly as wet from crossing as he was after our 'disagreement.'
XXX
Reaching Khenderlan
Khenderlan is near. Unfortunately, so is the werewolf clan's home. Tread lightly and we may be able to avoid the worst of them.
Watch out for werewolves as you continue toward Khenderlan

Antidote
You've done it now. I expect you'll have to deal with Poison Fang now. Perhaps you'll finally be the antidote that cures Belwain's Hollow of his presence.

I've seen far more experienced elves fall at Poison Fang's feet. Color me impressed.

Khenderlan Summers
I haven't been this close to Khenderlan in a long time. I don't exactly relish the trip down memory lane. But we have no choice: We must go there and stop Tianne.

Ruinous
Explore the Khenderlan ruins and clear the area of darkspawn
Like Oil and Water
When Ravi chose to become a Templar, that was the end of him and Iselle... or so I thought. It was bad enough that he was a human and she an elf. But Templars and Mages just don't mix.

Quest Complete
There it is: Khenderlan, the former estate of the once-great Viscount Khedra.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Priorities...

If you really want to make your mentor happy, take the western path. There's a secret hiding place where you may be able to retrieve something Ravi will treasure dearly. If you'd instead like to commence with the bloodshed, which I would recommend, take the eastern path to the vineyards.
Continue through the Green Dales toward Tianne
A Split Path
Choose to recover the item for Ravi or continue toward Tianne
Continue Onward
Continue On Towards Tianne
Lost Memories

I remember when Iselle first gave this enchanted amulet to Ravi, it was the night they first kissed, as I recall. And no, I don't think its weird that a Ranger would spy on his sister's private affairs. How much could I trust a human, after all?
XXX
Quest Complete
We've nearly reached the vineyard where you'll find Tianne. Chopping down all these trees, however, makes me a bit concerned for an old friend.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Petrified

There is a forest spirit near here, the Twisted Birch, that I am quite fond of. Your skills as a lumberjack aside, you chopping down all these Sylvans has me concerned Tianne may be dominating him as well.
Look for the forest spirit known as the Twisted Birch
Timber!
Find out what has become of the Twisted Birch
Subduing Soliel

Interesting that Lukesh and Ravi had you capture Soliel instead of merely offing her. I suppose he'll want the same with Tianne. My clan's keeper and I were friends before this all started, so I wouldn't relish the idea of you killing her either.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Quest Complete
The Twisted Birch... I'll mourn his death. But I'm glad I was there to see the old tree chopped down.
This is a placeholder string. Please report where you encountered it.
Bacchanalia
You will find Tianne in the Vineyard. Let's end this bacchanalia and bring her to Ravi and Lukesh.
Continue your search for Tianne in the vineyard
The Vineyard
Reach Tianne by traveling through the vineyard
Eiton's Birth

When Iselle died giving birth to Eiton, it was unsurprising that he came out a human. That always happens when humans and elves are foolish enough to mate. The boy being a tranquil? That was the unexpected part.

Quest Complete
You've made your way to the Vineyard. Now, lets end this and set my clan free, what's left of it at least.

Take Down Tianne
Capture Tianne so that we can bring her back to Ravi and Lukesh.
Tianne has become corrupted and must be stopped
Finders, Keepers
Defeat and capture the corrupted Keeper Tianne
Quest Complete
{%HeroName%}, you have done an admirable job. Let's bring her to Ravi. It's been a long time since I've seen him or Lukesh. Or my bastard nephew, for that matter.
